prompt: You have unmoderated usability test recordings of 12 participants completing a checkout flow on a B2C e-commerce site. Participants were asked to buy a specific item. The average task completion rate was 58%. Describe how you would analyze these recordings, what you would look for, and how you would present findings to an engineering team that has never seen user research before.
_note: Tests: structured analysis method (not just 'watch the videos'), specific error categories to look for, and ability to translate research into engineering-ready bug/story format.
